{{Quote|Flitters are small flying rodents that can imitate other beings' speech, for those who aren't familiar with this particular rodent. I sure wasn't a month ago. I have no idea why anyone would want such a little horror in his or her home, but there you are.|[[Cynabar]]|<ref name="GNN3" />}}
'''Shamarok flitters''' were flying creatures with leathery wings that was [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]].

==Description==
Shamarok flitters were small, flying [[Rodent/Legends|rodents]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. They could imitate other beings' speech.<ref name="GNN3" />

==History==
In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Shamarok flitters became a heavily sought after item amongst the wealthy elite on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]. [[Cynabar]] advised that anyone looking for a quick [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]]-turnaround should buy flitters from [[Ithorian Herdship]]s for around 400 credits, and sell them on Lianna for around 1,200 credits. Cynabar believed that the window of opportunity would remain open for another [[Standard week/Legends|week]], and that anyone looking to take advantage should carry permit [[IC-40X1-CRE]] from [[Imperial Trade and Commerce Authority|Imperial Commerce]] to ensure they could get through customs.<ref name="GNN3" />

{{Creature-stub}}
